notes: go build and go vet pass cleanly. Fixed go.mod module name from falke-remote to hermes-remote. Added 25 command-type constants (Server→Agent direction) covering shell, filesystem, screen, input, and system categories. AgentInfo struct already present. All protocol files compile without errors.

Created internal/server/ with 4 Go files: server.go (multi-session WS server, HTTP API /api/agents, /api/agent/{id}/shell, bearer token auth), registry.go (agent registry with Register/Unregister/ListAgents/Heartbeat, persistence to /opt/data/hermes-remote/agent_registry.json), proxy.go (LLM proxy reading HERMES_REMOTE_LLM_KEY/DEEPSEEK_API_KEY/MINIMAX_API_KEY/OLLAMA_API_KEY from env), session.go (per-agent session manager with memory/skills/context). All compile and vet clean: go build ./internal/server/... passes.

Created tool/plugin.py and tool/plugin.yaml. Registers 5 tools (remote_agent_list, remote_shell, remote_fs_read, remote_fs_write, remote_screenshot) into hermes-remote toolset via ctx.register_tool(). Uses python requests, reads HERMES_REMOTE_TOKEN and HERMES_REMOTE_URL from environment. Created cmd/server/main.go entry point. Built server binary and verified live: agent_list returns [], shell executes commands locally. All tools load and register cleanly.

Created cmd/hermes-remote/main.go with --connect/--listen/--mode/--token/--name flags. Fixed import paths from falke-remote to hermes-remote in agent.go, platform.go, platform_linux.go. Fixed Platform interface: Exec signature (4 args, no pty bool), Health takes mode string. Removed duplicate base64Encode from platform_linux.go. Replaced exec.CommandContext with manual timeout goroutine. Fixed getOS/getArch to use runtime.GOOS/GOARCH. Added SendPrompt method to agent for interactive mode. Removed unused os import from agent.go. Binary at cmd/hermes-remote/hermes-remote (8.5MB). go build ./cmd/hermes-remote/ and go vet ./... clean.
